generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal movement of the crane cart via TMC4671-Eval motor driver for precise positional accuracy"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical movement of the crane hoist via TMC4671-Eval motor driver with closed-loop feedback for swing mitigation"
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup and drop operations controlled via Arduino interface"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring hoist swinging dynamics in real-time for trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring wind speed data for operational context awareness"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorControllerMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Built-in monitoring capabilities of TMC4671-Eval motor drivers providing real-time motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoSensorAggregator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based system aggregating sensor data and interfacing with physical crane controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerMonitor
]

instance AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorAggregator
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D Fusion360 model providing spatial representation of the gantry crane structure and components"
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-implemented mathematical model of crane motion (cart/hoist dynamics) for trajectory generation and swing minimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelEnabler
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Software replica of physical crane behavior including motor responses and swinging dynamics for validation purposes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBSchema : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured TimescaleDB schema for storing time-series sensor data, motor trajectories, and validation metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData [SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, MotorStateDataTransmitted, AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted]
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDatabase
]

instance SensorDataCollection : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data including swing angle measurements and wind speed readings logged in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData [SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted]
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataLoggingService
]

instance MotorTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart and hoist motor position data used for trajectory generation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance ValidationMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Distance metrics and threshold values used for comparing executed vs simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationService
]

instance CapellaSystemModels : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella-based system engineering models for educational purposes demonstrating crane architecture and behavior"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating asynchronous communication between physical sensors and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables [DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ValidationService]
]

instance TimescaleDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB PostgreSQL-based time-series database optimized for high-frequency sensor and motor data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables [DataLoggingService, HistoricalAnalysisService]
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization platform providing real-time and historical data visualization with trajectory traces and confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:enables [VisualizationService, AlertingService]
]

instance KinematicModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic modeling framework implementing cart/hoist dynamics for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation framework replicating physical crane behavior for validation purposes"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker deployment environment containing database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services via docker-compose"
    DTDFVocab:enables [TimescaleDatabase, MQTTBroker, GrafanaDashboard]
]

instance GantryLibMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module encapsulating all digital twin services including logging, trajectory generation, and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables [DataLoggingService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ValidationService]
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous recording of crane state (motors, sensors) in TimescaleDB with SQL-based querying capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical visualization of crane trajectories with simulation confidence bounds via Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematics-based service computing smooth, swing-minimized paths for crane cart and hoist motors using predefined models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital twin simulation service replicating physical crane behavior for trajectory execution validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time validation service comparing executed trajectories with simulated trajectories using distance metrics and thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides [ValidationAlertAction, FaultDetectionInsight]
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Post-operation analysis service querying TimescaleDB for trends in wear patterns and environmental impacts"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalTrendInsight
]

instance AlertingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based alerting system triggering notifications when trajectory deviations exceed predefined limits"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured storage of crane operational data in TimescaleDB for historical analysis and validation"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of crane trajectories with real-time sensor data visualization"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed optimal paths that minimize swinging motion during crane operations"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison results between simulated and executed trajectories showing behavioral fidelity"
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "MQTT-based alert system notifying operators of trajectory deviations exceeding thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series classification results identifying anomalies in sensor/motor data for predictive maintenance"
]

instance HistoricalTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Long-term analysis of operational data revealing wear patterns and environmental impacts"
]

// C1: Environment
instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains [PhysicalCraneSystem, DigitalTwinSystem]
]

// C12: Components
instance PhysicalCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with frame, motors, controllers, electromagnet, and sensor suite for container transport simulation"
    base:isContainedIn CraneEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin infrastructure including all modeling, simulation, and validation components"
    base:isContainedIn CraneEnvironment
]

// C13: Relationships
instance DataFlowToDatabase : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:to TimescaleDBSchema
]

instance DataFlowToTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from MotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:to MotorTrajectoryData
]

instance ModelInputToEnabler : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from CraneKinematicModel
    DTDFVocab:to KinematicModelEnabler
]

instance ServiceEnablesInsight : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from ValidationService
    DTDFVocab:to [ValidationAlertAction, FaultDetectionInsight]
]

instance EnablerSupportsService : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from DockerContainerization
    DTDFVocab:to [TimescaleDatabase, MQTTBroker, GrafanaDashboard]
]

instance PhysicalCraneComponents : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from PhysicalCraneSystem
    DTDFVocab:to [CartMotor, HoistMotor, CraneElectromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, MotorControllerMonitor, ArduinoSensorAggregator]
]

instance DigitalTwinComponents : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    DTDFVocab:from DigitalTwinSystem
    DTDFVocab:to [CraneCADModel, CraneKinematicModel, CraneSimulationModel, TimescaleDBSchema, MQTTBroker, GrafanaDashboard, GantryLibMiddleware]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is unidirectional in this exemplar, as the digital twin primarily **observes and validates** rather than directly controlling the physical crane. However, it provides:
  - **Optimal trajectory generation** via the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which computes kinematically feasible paths for the crane’s motors (cart and hoist) to minimize residual swinging.
  - **Simulation outputs** from the **Simulation Service** (e.g., predicted trajectories, confidence bounds) displayed on the **Grafana dashboard** for operator review.
  - **Alerts** via the dashboard when continuous validation thresholds are breached, prompting manual intervention (e.g., recalibration). The digital twin does not autonomously adjust physical parameters but enables **semi-autonomous validation** of operator actions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on a **real-time/near-real-time** time scale, with continuous data logging and validation. The **Logging Application** streams sensor data at unspecified intervals (implied to be high-frequency, e.g., ~10–100Hz for motor control), while the **Continuous Validation Service** performs periodic comparisons (frequency unspecified but tied to trajectory execution). The **Trajectory Generator** and **Simulation Service** operate on-demand for trajectory planning and validation, respectively. No explicit latency or synchronization frequency is documented beyond 'continuous' operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **Physical Crane Interface**: Python module bridging the Arduino-based controller to the digital twin services.
  2. **Logging Application**: Continuously writes sensor/motor data to TimescaleDB via MQTT.
  3. **Trajectory Generator Service**: Computes optimal paths using the kinematic model and publishes them via MQTT.
  4. **Simulation Service**: Replicates physical behavior for validation, with outputs compared against real trajectories.
  5. **Continuous Validation Service**: Monitors distance metrics between real and simulated trajectories, triggering alerts via MQTT.
  6. **Dashboard (Grafana)**: Aggregates data from TimescaleDB and MQTT for visualization and operator interaction.
  All components communicate via **MQTT topics** and share a **central TimescaleDB** for data persistence. The system is deployed on a **single personal computer** with Docker managing the database, broker, and dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical crane’s life cycle, focusing on **runtime monitoring, validation, and optimization** of operational performance. It does not model the **as-designed** (CAD) or **as-manufactured** phases explicitly, though CAD models (Fusion360) are included for reference. The twin’s primary role is **operational twinning**, enabling continuous validation and fault detection during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Kinematic Model Accuracy**: The digital twin’s trajectory generator uses a **precise kinematic model** of the crane’s cart/hoist dynamics, validated against real-world data.
  - **Continuous Validation**: A **distance metric-based comparison** between executed and simulated trajectories, with configurable thresholds. Deviations trigger alerts via Grafana.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Simulation confidence bounds (upper/lower bounds) are displayed on the dashboard to quantify prediction errors.
  - **Verification**: The **Simulation Service** is validated against physical data in [5], and fault detection methods are evaluated in [6] using time-series classification.
  - **Validation**: Post-operation analysis of logged data (TimescaleDB) to cross-validate models with real-world performance. The twin does not include **uncertainty propagation** or **Bayesian calibration** mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin connects to the physical system via:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Eclipse Mosquitto broker enables asynchronous, lightweight communication between the **Arduino** (physical sensors) and digital twin services (e.g., Logging Application, Continuous Validation Service).
  - **Local Network**: All components (physical crane, PC, and digital twin services) are deployed on a **single personal computer**, eliminating external network dependencies.
  - **Python Interfaces**: The **Physical Crane Interface** and **Control Application** act as bridges between hardware and digital twin services, using MQTT for data exchange. No explicit mention of JSON payloads or latency metrics is provided beyond 'continuous' data streaming."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is **locally hosted** on a **personal computer** with the following deployment details:
  - **Hardware**: Single host machine running the physical crane controller and digital twin services.
  - **Software Stack**:
    - **Database**: TimescaleDB (Docker container).
    - **Broker**: Eclipse Mosquitto (Docker container).
    - **Dashboard**: Grafana (Docker container).
    - **Services**: Python-based (gantrylib module) running natively on the host.
  - **Deployment Method**: Docker Compose for container orchestration, with automatic initialization of database schemas and dashboard configurations. The **gantrylib** module is installed via pip for Python-based services. No cloud or distributed hosting is used."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards and conventions:
  - **Data Standards**: Uses **TimescaleDB** (PostgreSQL-compatible) for time-series data, enabling SQL-based querying.
  - **Communication**: MQTT protocol (IETF standard) for inter-service communication.
  - **Modeling**: Kinematic models follow **standard robotics conventions** (e.g., forward/inverse kinematics for gantry cranes).
  - **No Formal Frameworks**: Avoids commercial digital twin frameworks (e.g., Eclipse Ditto, BaSyx) in favor of an **ad-hoc, modular approach** with open-source tools. The **CAD models** use Autodesk Fusion360, and **Arcadia models** follow Capella standards for systems engineering."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are implicitly addressed through:
  - **Local Deployment**: All components (physical crane and digital twin) operate on a **single personal computer**, minimizing exposure to external cyber threats.
  - **Operator Control**: The **Human Machine Interface (HMI)** provides direct oversight, allowing manual intervention if automated alerts indicate anomalies.
  - **Data Isolation**: The **TimescaleDB** and **MQTT Broker** are containerized, reducing cross-service vulnerabilities.
  - **No Remote Actuation**: The digital twin does not execute remote operations on the physical crane; all control decisions are advisory and require operator confirmation.
  The system lacks explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) beyond the default security of local networks and open-source tools. Safety is ensured through **threshold-based validation** and **manual override capabilities**."
]
